query:
INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_compute.custom_domains
            (id, app_id, domain, status,
             cloudflare_zone_id, cloudflare_record_id,
             cloudflare_custom_hostname_id,
             tls_status, created_at, updated_at)
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                status = VALUES(status),
                cloudflare_zone_id = VALUES(cloudflare_zone_id),
                cloudflare_record_id =
                    VALUES(cloudflare_record_id),
                cloudflare_custom_hostname_id =
                    VALUES(cloudflare_custom_hostname_id),
                tls_status = VALUES(tls_status),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
